title: Android app bug with dependency column
excerpt: Anyone else having this problem? The dependency column shows up on my phone (s20 samsung) but doesn’t do anything when you click on it to add a dependency item.

posts.author: christianPE (Christian Landry)
posts.cookedHtml: Anyone else having this problem? The dependency column shows up on my phone (s20 samsung) but doesn’t do anything when you click on it to add a dependency item.
